summary: The static-file transaction pruning divergence is rustfmt-only noise: one no-work return semicolon and one test arithmetic line wrap.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 258: M	crates/prune/prune/src/segments/static_file/transactions.rs.
The isolated patch only adds a semicolon to the existing no-transactions early return.
The remaining test hunk wraps the deleted-entry-limit arithmetic without changing operands or precedence.
No transaction pruning range, limiter, or expected last-pruned transaction behavior changed.
